commit.message: Fix health check. Now we pass the s3 path instead of a presigned url, and increase timeout
Change server configuration from 'granian' to 'daphne' in model-w.toml
Update widget version to 0.2.17 and integrate createHead for improved head management
Update Python version and modelw-docker dependency in Dockerfile
Remove llama index, which is a pain in the ass, and solve a lot of dependency issues and security
Remove cli as it's not used
Fix event logging when using  use_conversation_context
Update httpx dependency to version 0.28.1 in pyproject.toml and poetry.lock; increment SDK version to 0.1.54.
Update poetry.lock and pyproject.toml to reflect package version upgrades and maintain compatibility with Python versions.
Merge branch 'develop' of github.com:ChatFAQ/ChatFAQ into develop
Implement secure file upload and retrieval API with presigned URLs. Enhance error handling and add expiration time for URLs. Update file storage logic to use private storage for improved security.
Add secure file upload API with presigned URL support
update lock and fix event model
Update Dockerfile to use Python 3.12.11 and upgrade modelw-docker to version 2025.4.0 with health dependencies.
Update version to 0.2.13 in package.json and package-lock.json
Refactor conversation deletion logic in run_module_simulation to ensure it executes after the simulation, with improved error handling for deletion exceptions.
Update dependencies in poetry.lock and pyproject.toml; add health admin interface and modify user email field to use EmailField with custom collation. Adjust URL routing for health checks.
Refactor temperature and max_tokens handling in Claude and OpenAI client classes to use NOT_GIVEN as default when values are not provided.

Enhance file upload and download functionality to support multiple files. Updated serializers to handle multiple presigned URLs and S3 paths. Modified frontend components to accommodate new file handling format, including validation for maximum file uploads. Improved error handling during file uploads.

Merge from dev to prod (#3)

* Add thinking

* Update package versions

* allowing voice on mobiles

* some models do not accept the extra args 'thinking'  and 'cache_config' lets check for that dynamically

* Created and endpoint for rag retrieve and updating the SDK with http requests for retrieve and feedback

* not rendering tool type msgs

* Updating widget version

* controlling hwo we show tool use messages from the admin

* version update

* Small variable renaming on widget

* Bug fixing on the speech to text on the widget

* Supporting wildcards on widget config domains

* debug mode logging for speech to text

* Big refactor of the speech to text functionality: now the controls of the prompt are in its own component

* Adding grammars to the phrase speech recognition

* new refactor, putting the input prompt in its own component

* small fix

* new version

* Small bugfixes when displaying widget prompt controls

* bugfix on the speech recognition func

* widget version upgrade

* Small bugfix on manually starting STT

* widget bugfix, we forgot starting phrase TTS on initialization

* widget interim results now are configurable for performance reasons

* Enhance Knowledge Item Review: fallback to reference title and content if KI not found in backend

* Update some versions for compatiblity

* Small things for better mcp compatibility

* idk agent imporvements

* using a widget config on chanel

* Remove log dissabling

* Add anonymization FSM example with presidio

* filtering conversations with user feedback was broken because of the remodeling of the User Feedback itself

* first iteration on spliting the content of the widget if an iframe is provided

* Making props from the Widget component reactive from the outside

* Proper scroll on splited screen

* Sending messages from iframed split screen to chat

* Halfway on finishing the new feedback + explanation commands on the FSM

* Small refactor to request prompts in a simpler way

* Bugfix when uploading a file from on the widget

* Fixes, full feedback loop working

* Barebones on injecting into the prompt the information of each module result

* Basic operators now can be applied to Conditions

* Update some dependencies

* disabling wagtail

* encoder for message sender types for conversations

* Async view for querying the LLM

* version bumps

* dispatching chatfaq-messages-change event also on change conversation

* Version bump

* There we go, all feedback backend and read submission from the FSM

* Resizing functionality for the widget when the screen is splitted by an iframe

* dev package for analyzing resulting bundle size

* version bump

* Fixed imports from a merge bug

* nvm

* import bugfix

* Bugfix: Widget was not reading properly attributes set from outside itself

* Variables should be outside try catch since they are reference it on the catch

* Adding AZOR_PRIVATE_KEY for encrypting API Keys

* Adding GOOGLE_API_KEY to lef chatfaq

* updating chatrag

* better error loging on agents

* Bugfix, someone removed the state saving of our FSM

* Fix health checks

---------

Co-authored-by: Hector Soria <hector.soria@with-madrid.com>

readme_html:
- An Open Source RAG & Agent ecosystem for your business needs

ChatFAQ is an open-source platform and framework for creating diverse AI-powered conversational solutions:

  • LLM-based chatbots
  • RAG-enhanced chatbots
  • Agentic workflows
  • Rule-based Finite State Machines with LLM assistance
  • Hybrid solutions combining multiple approaches

ChatFAQ fully relies on open-source technologies, allowing for flexibility, privacy, full control and costs-effectiveness.

It includes a SDK to build your specialized NLG engine and customized chat widgets, ensuring a tailored experience for users and avoiding vendor lock-in.

https://github.com/ChatFAQ/ChatFAQ/assets/127191313/7927f51f-d7ac-40e5-b4d0-62081742de4f

Documentation

The official documentation is hosted on Read the Docs.

Components

  • ChatFAQ SDK: A SDK to build agents, RAG pipelines, Finite State Machines and any other AI flow you can imagine.

  • Chat Widget: Embed a customizable chat interface into your website.

  • Admin Dashboard: A dashboard to manage all your knowledge bases, LLMs, retrievers, label conversations, see statistics, etc.

  • Ray Cluster: Power indexing pipelines, LLM inference, retrieval operations and more.

  • Backend: Django-based system to orchestrate all components.

  • Foundational Models:

    • Primary: vLLM integration for open-source LLMs
    • Additional: Integrations with OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Gemini and Together.

Visit Us!

For more information about ChatFAQ and any additional needs, feel free to visit our website

Or chat with us on Discord for any requests or inquiries about this repository.

Examples

Here are some examples of how to use the ChatFAQ SDK to build different types of conversational solutions:

  • LLM Example: This example demonstrates a simple chatbot using an LLM to generate responses. fsm_definition.py
  • RAG Example: This example shows how to build a chatbot that uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide more informed answers. fsm_definition.py
  • Feedbacks Example: This example shows how to collect user feedback using star ratings and text inputs. fsm_definition.py
  • Full KB RAG Example: This example demonstrates how to use the entire knowledge base for RAG and prompt caching, which can be useful given that context windows are large and we don't have to deploy a retriever. fsm_definition.py
  • Retrieve Example: This example shows how to use the retrieve function to fetch relevant information from a knowledge base. fsm_definition.py
  • Structured Generation Example: This example shows how to use the LLM to extract structured information from user input. fsm_definition.py
